positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial forest scene, featuring bioluminescent glowing flora and interwoven cosmic elements. The composition should be centered and highly detailed, resembling an ethereal mandala pattern perfect for apparel printing. Main subjects include floating, stylized lunar moons, gentle bioluminescent ferns, and stylized star clusters forming interlocking silhouettes. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, vivid turquoise, brilliant gold metallic accents, and deep forest green. The style must be high-contrast, elegant linework combined with soft gradient glow effects, emphasizing clean outlines and negative space for print clarity. Studio quality, vector art aesthetic, symmetrical radial composition, maximalism.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, words, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, poor composition, messy, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, grain, photorealistic
